title: Om Shanti Om
tmdbOverview: Reincarnated 30 years after being killed in a suspicious on-set fire, a small-time actor is determined to punish the person who ignited the blaze.
synopsis: Released in 2007, Om Shanti Om is a comedy, thriller and drama film from India. It carries a 6.8 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2000s and genre rankings. It carries a PG certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
